description: A plant operator notices a severe leak from a valve and must create an emergency maintenance work order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accesses the new work order screen.

nodes.task_description: Enter the equipment ID for the leaking valve and select 'Emergency' as the priority.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the asset and sets the priority level.

nodes.task_description: Describe the problem ('Severe leak from valve body') and submit the request, which should automatically page the on-call maintenance technician.

expected_outcome.value: Agent submits the work order, and an alert is sent to the technician.
